summary: Frontend testing completed for Ocean2joy Operational Chain & Documents section. All View/Download/Upload buttons work correctly. OS.1 v2.0 fields (files_accessed_at, work_accepted_at, payment_confirmed_by_admin_at) are now properly returned by API and displayed in UI.
critical_code_review_comments: All View buttons open modals with correct document content templates
All disabled buttons show proper tooltip messages explaining why they are disabled
Work Accepted Upload button correctly disabled with 'Already signed' message when work_accepted_at is set
Files Accessed Upload button correctly disabled with 'Auto-generated log' message
Quote Request Upload button correctly disabled with 'System document' message
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Operational Chain features working correctly. OS.1 v2.0 cycle complete with all dates populated.

work_accepted_section.details: Shows Acceptance Act (signed) with date Mar 12, 2026. View button opens modal with correct Acceptance Act template. Download button works (MOCKED). Upload button correctly DISABLED with tooltip 'Upload not available: Already signed'

files_accessed_section.details: Shows Download Confirmation (Confirmed) with date Mar 11, 2026. View button opens modal with correct Download Confirmation template. Download button works (MOCKED). Upload button correctly DISABLED with tooltip 'Upload not available: Auto-generated log'

payment_sent_section.details: Shows Payment Proof (Confirmed) with date Mar 13, 2026. All 3 buttons (View/Download/Upload) work correctly. View shows Payment Proof template with transaction details. Upload opens modal for uploading payment proof.

payment_received_section.details: Shows Payment Confirmation (Confirmed) with View button only, and Receipt (Generated) with View/Download buttons. Receipt modal shows correct content with PAID IN FULL status.

disabled_button_tooltips.details: All disabled buttons show proper tooltip messages: 'System document', 'Auto-generated log', 'Already signed', 'Read-only notes', 'Deliverable file'

view_modals.details: All View modals display correct document content with proper formatting and data from project

download_functionality.details: Download buttons show alert 'will be implemented with actual file storage' - EXPECTED MOCKED behavior

upload_modals.details: Upload buttons open correct modals (Upload Signed Invoice, Upload Payment Proof, Upload Acceptance Act) with file input and appropriate instructions

mocked_functionality.download: handleDownload shows alert instead of actual file download - EXPECTED

os1_v2_compliance.step_12_acceptance_completion: PASS - work_accepted_at tracked and displayed with signed Acceptance Act
